topic: Large-language-model agents for academic literature review workflows
objective: Turn a broad thesis idea into a focused review topic and retrieval plan.
questions: Which stages of academic literature review are currently supported by LLM agents?
How do these systems evaluate grounding, coverage, and citation faithfulness?
What gaps remain for practical use in thesis or paper writing?
in_scope: agentic systems for retrieval, screening, synthesis, or related-work drafting
out_of_scope: general chatbot assistants with no research workflow design
